meta.title: Do fighters need guns? Vietnam isn't where to find the answer...
meta.description:
This video is based on a much longer analysis into America's air combat struggles over Vietnam. You can read that article here:
https://www.sandboxx.us/news/more-than-missing-guns-why-america-lost-dogfights-over-vietnam/
